_comment: 卡牌美術生成統一設定檔。改這裡即可調整提示詞、加卡、換風格，不需動程式碼。gen-art.ps1(Grok) 與 gen-art-openai.ps1(GPT) 都讀這份。
styleSuffix: Fantasy trading-card art, painterly digital illustration, dramatic lighting, single subject centered, dark atmospheric background, no text, no card frame, no border, square composition.

themePresets._comment: 可選風格樣板，把 styleSuffix 換成其中之一即可整套換風格。
themePresets.fantasy: Fantasy trading-card art, painterly digital illustration, dramatic lighting, single subject centered, dark atmospheric background, no text, no frame, square composition.
themePresets.cyber: Cyberpunk sci-fi trading-card art, neon-lit, holographic, futuristic, single subject centered, dark tech background, no text, no frame, square composition.
themePresets.forest: Mystical nature trading-card art, lush, bioluminescent, earthy palette, single subject centered, dark forest background, no text, no frame, square composition.
themePresets.ink: Traditional ink-wash painting style, monochrome with one accent color, single subject centered, minimal background, no text, no frame, square composition.
